ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_img" TEXT /* URL or path to the city's image */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "geographical_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the city */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the city */,
  "destruction_level" INTEGER /* Current destruction level of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monsters" (
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster */,
  "monster_name" TEXT /* Name of the monster */,
  "monster_img" TEXT /* URL or path to the monster's image */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the monster */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health of the monster */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the monster */,
  "attack_power" INTEGER /* Attack power of the monster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monster_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the monster type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the monster type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monster_weaknesses" (
  "weakness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weakness */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster type that the weakness is associated with */,
  "weakness_name" TEXT /* Name of the weakness */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weakness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weakness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invasions" (
  "invasion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invasion */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being invaded */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster invading the city */,
  "destruction_level" INTEGER /* Level of destruction caused by the invasion */,
  "invasion_date" TEXT /* Date of the invasion */,
  "invasion_time" TEXT /* Time of the invasion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invasion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invasions_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invasions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_monsters" (
  "city_monster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city-monster association */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city that has been invaded */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster that invaded the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_monster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_monsters_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_monsters_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "invasion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invasion scenario for the level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "level_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_invasion_id FOREIGN KEY ("invasion_id") REFERENCES invasions ("invasion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level that the reward is associated with */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Number of points awarded for the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose progress is being tracked */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level that the user has completed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score earned by the user for completing the level */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time of completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)
